channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-18325] interop: sanity test_842: FAIL: trevis-103vm12 load_module ldlm_extent failed
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for jianyu <yujian@whamcloud.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/abd53ed7-568d-4c29-9105-8d9f4349c43a

test_842 failed with the following error:

== sanity test 842: Measure ldlm_extent performance ====== 04:18:42 (1728015522)
STAMP 1728015522
CMD: trevis-103vm12 PATH=/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/opt/iozone/bin:/opt/iozone/bin:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/mpi:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/racer:/usr/lib64/lustre/../lustre-iokit/sgpdd-survey:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/utils/gss:/usr/lib64/lustre/utils:/opt/iozone/bin:/usr/lib64/openmpi/bin:/usr/share/Modules/bin:/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin::/sbin:/bin:/usr/sbin: NAME=autotest_config 		TESTLOG_PREFIX=/autotest/autotest-1/2024-10-03/lustre-reviews_full-dne-part-2_108128_1002_80999c16-58df-43f3-adcb-708b5e018930//sanity TESTNAME=test_842 		CONFIG=/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/cfg/autotest_config.sh bash rpc.sh load_module kunit/ldlm_extent 
trevis-103vm12: CMD: trevis-103vm19 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n version 2>/dev/null
trevis-103vm12: CMD: trevis-103vm19 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n version 2>/dev/null
trevis-103vm12: CMD: trevis-103vm12 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n version 2>/dev/null
trevis-103vm12: CMD: trevis-103vm12.trevis.whamcloud.com /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n version 2>/dev/null
trevis-103vm12: trevis-103vm12.trevis.whamcloud.com: executing load_module kunit/ldlm_extent
trevis-103vm12: modprobe: FATAL: Module ldlm_extent not found in directory /lib/modules/4.18.0-553.5.1.el8_lustre.x86_64
pdsh@trevis-103vm10: trevis-103vm12: ssh exited with exit code 1
 sanity test_842: @@@@@@ FAIL: trevis-103vm12 load_module ldlm_extent failed

Test session details:
clients: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-master/4581 - 4.18.0-553.16.1.el8_10.x86_64
servers: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-b2_15/94 - 4.18.0-553.5.1.el8_lustre.x86_64

<<Please provide additional information about the failure here>>

VVVVVVV DO NOT REMOVE LINES BELOW, Added by Maloo for auto-association VVVVVVV
sanity test_842 - trevis-103vm12 load_module ldlm_extent failed
item.summary: interop: sanity test_842: FAIL: trevis-103vm12 load_module ldlm_extent failed

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment:
"Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>" merged in patch https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/56630/
Subject: LU-18325 tests: sanity 842: load_module ldlm_extent failed
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set:
Commit: ad3d4028de5fa936cc50e39498a2a41220ea8ffe

"Yang Sheng <ys@whamcloud.com>" uploaded a new patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/56630
Subject: LU-18325 tests: sanity 842: load_module ldlm_extent failed
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: 522782ae1a8fedd0c140715f3b60512026d51f17
The ldlm_extent module was just added on master, so this subtest should be skipped for any MDS with an older version.
